name: caseforge-core
description: Headless DFIR agentic core: OpenCode SDK controller + VERDICT MCP tools + universal LLM routing + privacy-mode router + structured findings + custody validation.
author: Timothy Vang

scripts.build: npm run build -w @verdict/caseforge-sdk && npm run build -w @verdict/caseforge-tui && npm run build -w @verdict/caseforge-cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @verdict/caseforge-sdk && npm run build -w @verdict/caseforge-tui && npm run typecheck -w @verdict/caseforge-cli
